attempts.insight: biprod / biprod.lift resolve under file-level `open CategoryTheory Limits` (no `Limits.` prefix needed). MayerVietorisSquare-dot accessors `S.X₂`, `S.X₃`, `S.X₄`, `S.f₂₄`, `S.f₃₄` resolve verbatim against Mathlib's GrothendieckTopology.MayerVietorisSquare structure. `Opposite.op` qualification is required (under `open CategoryTheory` alone `op` does not resolve). Dot-notation `J.MayerVietorisSquare` for S's type unfolds to `GrothendieckTopology.MayerVietorisSquare J` automatically. Verified: lean_verify returns kernel-only axioms {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}; lean_diagnostic_messages returns {success: true, items: [], failed_dependencies: []}.

attempts.insight: Unary minus on a presheaf morphism is preadditive-structure-driven. `-(P.map f.op)` for P : Cᵒᵖ ⥤ AddCommGrpCat resolves automatically via the Preadditive instance on AddCommGrpCat (auto-inferred). The alternating-sum sign is what makes the queued iter-018 toBiprod ≫ fromBiprod = 0 lemma possible (without it, the composition would equal 2·(...).map f₁₂.op·(...).map f₂₄.op rather than zero). Verified: lean_verify returns kernel-only axioms {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}; per-fiber rfl compatibility from iter-016 unchanged (verified by lean_run_code probe — `((HModule'_cohomologyPresheaf k F n).obj (Opposite.op X) : Type u) = HModule' k F n X` continues to hold by rfl).

next_steps: Iter-018: composition-is-zero lemma `toBiprod ≫ fromBiprod = 0` (simp-level closure on the sign-paired biproduct) and the connecting hom δ. Iter-019+: LES sequence + exactness.
